llm_raw:
{"decision":"escalate","args":{}}

The deadline has already passed, so a retry would fail identically — time doesn't rewind, making this a deterministic condition. Between abort and escalate, unilaterally aborting a customer order with contract implications is a business decision an agent shouldn't make on its own; escalating hands the SLA-violation judgment (cancel, complete late with penalty, negotiate) to a human, which is the safe choice.
